caption: The video features a man standing outdoors in what appears to be a rural village setting, with mud-brick houses and a dirt ground visible in the background. The man is dressed in a white shirt and speaks directly to the camera, sharing his personal story. Subtitles at the bottom of the screen reveal that he is recounting his experience of fleeing atrocities committed by rebel groups in the Congo. As he speaks, the camera remains focused on him, capturing his serious expression and the earnestness of his narrative. In the background, other villagers can be seen going about their daily activities, adding context to the environment and emphasizing the ongoing life amidst hardship. The scene conveys a sense of resilience and the human impact of conflict.
